Require retention schedule and deletion assistance evidence.

input_summary: Case facts, evidence matches, missing evidence, and prior specialist context.
output_summary: Security or continuity proof incomplete: privileged access approval, continuity evidence, release-control signoff, secrets rotation plan.

requiredActions: Require privileged access approval, named accounts, time-boxed elevation, and session logging evidence.
Require BCP/DR and exit assistance evidence for critical workflows.

Require secrets rotation plan, vault ownership, environment separation, and exit rotation evidence.
Require BCP/DR and exit assistance evidence for critical workflows.

input_summary: Case facts, evidence matches, missing evidence, and prior specialist context.
output_summary: No material AI/model-training signal detected beyond standard human-review boundary.

input_summary: Case facts, missing evidence, and specialist challenges.
output_summary: Matched precedent pattern: general incomplete evidence -> human review controls; similar learning cases=5, top pattern=Cross-border SaaS missing retention schedule.

precedent.pattern: general incomplete evidence -> human review controls

similarCases.title: Cross-border SaaS missing retention schedule
addedControls: Require retention schedule and deletion assistance evidence.
Require cross-border transfer mechanism and support-region confirmation.
Add reviewer question: Are any support teams accessing records outside approved regions?

similarCases.title: Healthcare analytics vendor missing model-training exclusion
addedControls: Require signed model-training exclusion for patient or customer data before production.
Confirm DPA amendment covers analytics support, subprocessors, retention, deletion, and cross-border review.
Add reviewer question: Has any analytics data been used for model improvement or service training?

similarCases.title: SaaS vendor missing subprocessor list
addedControls: Require current subprocessor register before approval.
Require 30-day subprocessor change notification and right to object.
Add reviewer question: Are support and hosting locations consistent with transfer assessment?

similarCases.title: AI vendor permitted customer-data training
addedControls: Reject or escalate when customer-data model training is permitted and no signed opt-out exists.
Require signed model-training exclusion and human oversight plan before reconsideration.
Add reviewer question: Does the vendor use prompts, tickets, or submitted records for model improvement?

similarCases.title: Complete vendor package approved with monitoring
addedControls: Keep annual SOC 2 and ISO evidence refresh on reviewer calendar.
Monitor subprocessor changes and retention exceptions quarterly.
Confirm accountable human owner before operational approval.

controlSuggestions: Require retention schedule and deletion assistance evidence.
Require cross-border transfer mechanism and support-region confirmation.
Add reviewer question: Are any support teams accessing records outside approved regions?
Require signed model-training exclusion for patient or customer data before production.
Confirm DPA amendment covers analytics support, subprocessors, retention, deletion, and cross-border review.
Add reviewer question: Has any analytics data been used for model improvement or service training?
Require current subprocessor register before approval.
Require 30-day subprocessor change notification and right to object.
learningContext.note: Learning memory is advisory. Deterministic policy and current evidence remain authoritative.

output_summary: Skipped live Compass call; deterministic local council remains active.

input_summary: Specialist challenges, precedent pattern, and Compass advisory status.
output_summary: Required controls revised to 14 action(s); final risk=high.

required_actions: Assign the accountable business unit or requester before approval.
Confirm the operating geography and regulatory perimeter.
Ask the domain owner whether esg, hse and bcm obligations apply.
Require privileged access approval, named accounts, time-boxed elevation, and session logging evidence.
Require executed data processing addendum for integration and support data flows.
Require BCP/DR and exit assistance evidence for critical workflows.
Require release-control signoff, rollback evidence, and post-release monitoring before production change.
Require secrets rotation plan, vault ownership, environment separation, and exit rotation evidence.
Require signed DPA covering processing scope, subprocessors, retention, deletion, and transfers.
Require retention schedule and deletion assistance evidence.
Require cross-border transfer mechanism and hosting/support region confirmation.
Require current subprocessor register and change-notification terms.
Resolve evidence gap: Business owner is not identified.
Resolve evidence gap: Jurisdiction or geography is missing.

input_summary: Unresolved high-risk gaps or insufficient proof remained after council review.
output_summary: Escalated to accountable human reviewer; no autonomous approval permitted.

input_summary: Node deterministic result, specialist critiques, precedent, and advisory-only Compass output.
output_summary: Final decision sealed as conditional_approval by deterministic policy owner.

input_summary: Decision, evidence, missing proof, council trace, and human review boundary.
output_summary: Packaged judge-readable audit trace with evidence, specialist challenges, and final owner.

input_summary: Final packaged decision and trace summary.
output_summary: Deterministic review supports conditional approval with named controls. Risk is high; 12 evidence gap(s) remain. Compass advisory status: skipped_sample_mode. Learning memory found 5 advisory similar case(s).
